conversation.message_text: innisfree: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/Tuv

innisfree: Welcome! Stock up + save up to 25% OFF sitewide during our Friends + Family Event. No code needed.
https://innisfree.attn.tv/aQvMZ-XL9dI8 

Have questions? Reply here & I'll be happy to help!
innisfree: Don't forget: Add us as a contact to your phone to have first dibs on exclusive perks!
(attn) Hey, I need help with something: how do I know if the 25% discount is being included in my shopping cart?

innisfree: Sure, I can help with that. When you add items to your cart and proceed to checkout, the 25% discount should be automatically applied and visible in the order summary. If you're not seeing the discount, please provide a screenshot so I can assist you further.
Oh I see it now! Thank you!
Also do you have a recommendation for a facial cleaner to use in the morning?

innisfree: Absolutely! I recommend our Cherry Blossom Glow Jam Cleanser. It's a gentle, jelly-to-foam cleanser with a sweet cherry blossom scent that leaves skin feeling soft and looking radiant. You can find it here: https://innisfree.attn.tv/sl/696IdCwW. Let me know if you have any other questions!
And that would be good to use every morning?

innisfree: Yes, the Cherry Blossom Glow Jam Cleanser is suitable for daily use every morning. It's gentle on the skin while effectively cleansing, making it a great start to your day. Always remember to follow up with a moisturizer to keep your skin hydrated. If you have any other questions, feel free to ask!
Can I send a screen shot of my cart to make sure I have a good moisturizer?
innisfree: Absolutely! Please go ahead and send a screenshot of your cart. I'll be happy to review your selections and provide feedback on the moisturizer you've chosen.

innisfree: Thanks for sharing the screenshot! I can see you have the Black Tea Youth Enhancing Cream in your cart. This enhancing cream is infused with our proprietary Black Tea Reset ConcentrateTM, use this cream as the last step in any skincare routine (before SPF, of course) to protect skin from environmental aggressors. The lightweight yet nourishing formula helps soothe and revitalize dull skin for a visibly healthier complexion. 

Feel free to let me know if there's anything else I can help you with. I'll be here. 
I'll also be looking forward to your order!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

L'ange: Thank you for reaching out. Please know that you actually won't be able to use multiple deals at checkout but feel free to use the one that has better value for you. As for your concern, can you please send me a screenshot of what you're seeing on your end? I'll be more than happy to look into this for you!
https://share.icloud.com/photos/01eQk7tIKbBy24EUuUJKSVZUw
Very confused and needing some clarification.. help please

L'ange: I just checked, and it looks like the item you're trying to purchase already has a discount automatically applied. That's why the promo code isn't working-the system usually doesn't allow multiple promotions to be used at the same time. You won't be able to combine deals at checkout, but feel free to go with the one that offers the best value for you.
